rationale: Both correctly identify PR #4834 as the cause and correctly explain the NotImplementedError guard's intent, matching yenuo26's bisection — but both overclaim resolution ('already fixed on main', recommend closing) when the actual thread shows the issue still under investigation (Flink-ddd asking yenuo26 to trigger a full CI sleep-mode test, no confirmation of a merged fix). Y is slightly better grounded, citing more distinct code locations (sleep/wake_up flag logic, the generate() admission guard, multiple named regression tests) and gives more complete end-to-end guidance for users hitting this at runtime. X's answer is comparable but includes an unrelated 'skill candidates' appendix (hunyuan-image3, issue #4891) that has nothing to do with this issue, slightly hurting polish/completeness.
